title: So how does this work
wikitext:
[]: So how does this work?             Quote Post by Heat149 » Mon Aug 01, 2011 12:46 am Alright, so Im sorta new to the rebuilds, and Im a little confused. I get that its a re-imagining of the original neon genesis series, but I just dont get the whole number thing. A friend tried to explain it to me, but i got lost, so whats the deal? There's 1.01, 1.11 and 2.22 so far right? Then whats the difference between 1.01 and 1.11, because someone told me theyre almost the same thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 01, 2011 12:59 am 1.0 is the theatrical version 1.01 is the home video version of 1.0; it had brightness problems. 1.11 is the second home video release, with a few minutes extra material added. For more details [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8926[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Heat149 » Mon Aug 01, 2011 1:01 am So if i were to torrent or buy the dvd's, Id only need to get 1.11 and 2.22 for now, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 01, 2011 2:37 am Heat149 wrote: So if i were to torrent or buy the dvd's, Id only need to get 1.11 and 2.22 for now, right?

I get that its a re-imagining of the original neon genesis series, but I just dont get the whole number thing. A friend tried to explain it to me, but i got lost, so whats the deal?
